rationale: Both notes indicate conceptual overlap in online review cue effects: the citing paper positions itself as extending prior WOM work on review attributes, and the cited paper is a prominent review-cue study (mobile vs nonmobile labels affecting credibility/purchase intentions). However, the only linkage evidence here is a single DOI match with no citation context snippet, so there is not enough direct evidence to confidently classify it as clearly substantive or clearly incidental.
